section_name: Suspension or Revocation of Deputy Branch Pilot’s Certificate
text: A deputy branch pilot’s certificate may be suspended or revoked by the board in the same manner and for the same reasons as provided for the revocation or suspension of a branch pilot’s license by Section 66.043 (Suspension or Revocation of Branch Pilot’s License) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.044 — Suspension or Revocation of Deputy Branch Pilot’s Certificate

A deputy branch pilot’s certificate may be suspended or revoked by the board in the same manner and for the same reasons as provided for the revocation or suspension of a branch pilot’s license by Section 66.043 (Suspension or Revocation of Branch Pilot’s License) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A deputy branch pilot’s certificate may be suspended or revoked by the board in the same manner and for the same reasons as provided for the revocation or suspension of a branch pilot’s license by Section 66.043 (Suspension or Revocation of Branch Pilot’s License) .
